summary: Fixed Bible compliance bug: Places API was triggering for non-location intents like 'Health checkup reminder' due to duplicate code path without NON_LOCATION_INTENTS guard. Applied same guard to second Places detection logic (lines 13803-13815).
critical_code_review_comments: ROOT CAUSE FOUND: mira_routes.py had TWO places where Places detection happened - first at lines 5715-5800 (had NON_LOCATION_INTENTS guard) and second at lines 13760-13820 (did NOT have the guard). Fix applied guard to second location.
Places guardrail now correctly blocks for: 'Health checkup reminder' (0 places), 'Schedule vaccination' (0 places), 'Remind me about vet' (0 places)
Find vets near me correctly returns mode='clarify' to ask for location first
Quick replies deduplication in frontend MiraDemoPage.jsx lines 4201-4232 is correctly implemented - checks last message for inline quick_replies before rendering bottom section
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing test user with pet (pet-e6348b13c975)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 223 fixed Places API guardrail. The NON_LOCATION_INTENTS guard was present at lines 5726-5736 but a second code path at lines 13760-13820 was re-detecting place types without the guard. Fix adds duplicate guard (NON_LOCATION_INTENTS_2) before line 13804. Both 'Health checkup reminder' and 'Schedule vaccination' now return 0 places.

verified_features.find_vets_near_me_clarify: PASS - Returns mode='clarify' to ask for location first
verified_features.find_groomer_no_auto_places: PASS - Does not auto-trigger places without explicit location
verified_features.quick_replies_no_duplicates: PASS - conversation_contract.quick_replies has no duplicate labels
verified_features.quick_replies_schema: PASS - All quick replies have id, label, payload_text fields

find_vets_near_me.status: PASS - Correctly asks for location first

rca_of_the_issue.problem: Places API was triggering for 'Health checkup reminder' even though NON_LOCATION_INTENTS guard was in place
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: mira_routes.py has TWO separate Places detection code paths: 1) Lines 5715-5800 with NON_LOCATION_INTENTS guard 2) Lines 13760-13820 WITHOUT the guard. The second path re-detects place types from NEARBY_KEYWORDS which includes 'checkup', 'vaccine', 'vaccination'. When user has city in profile, condition 'detected_place_type AND (is_location_query OR user_city)' passes at line 13804.
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Added duplicate NON_LOCATION_INTENTS_2 guard before line 13804 to block Places API when message contains non-location intent keywords
reproduction_steps: 1. Login as user with city in profile (dipali@clubconcierge.in)
3. Before fix: Response included nearby_places with 3 vet clinics
